message:
fix(parser,render): harden parsers against edge cases, add SVG XSS prevention, and fix terminal renderer underflows

DOT parser:
- Handle escaped quotes in labels via find_unescaped_quote_end() helper
- Fix comment stripping to track quote state as Option<char>, preventing
  // inside quoted strings from being stripped

Mermaid parser:
- Support chained edges (A-->B-->C) by returning Vec<IrNodeId> from
  parse_edge_statement_with_nodes with loop-based multi-edge parsing
- Add quote/bracket/paren/brace-aware operator finding so arrows inside
  node labels are not mistakenly matched
- Harden split_statements to track escape chars and nesting depth so
  semicolons inside labels are not treated as delimiters

SVG renderer:
- Add escape_xml_attr_value() for width/height attributes
- Escape inline <style> content to prevent </style><script> injection

Terminal renderer:
- Use saturating_sub and .max(1) for dimension calculations to prevent
  underflow panics on tiny terminals
- Sanitize control characters including ANSI escape sequences in labels
- Clamp max_label_chars and max_label_lines to minimum of 1
- Replace unwrap() with if-let on Header::from_bytes in CLI server

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
